item.title: 9000 Hours on This Farm Machine
item.description: A look at a well-used farm machine with 9,000 hours on it, showing the kind of equipment that keeps daily field work moving.

media:content.media:title: 9000 Hours on This Farm Machine
media:content.media:description: A look at a well-used farm machine with 9,000 hours on it, showing the kind of equipment that keeps daily field work moving.

item.title: Working the Kinks Out, Ep. 3
item.description: Larson Farms keeps working through equipment issues and getting the job done. A practical look at farm repairs and daily field work.

media:content.media:title: Working the Kinks Out, Ep. 3
media:content.media:description: Larson Farms keeps working through equipment issues and getting the job done. A practical look at farm repairs and daily field work.

item.title: More Horsepower and Duals for Mud Season
item.description: The equipments are ready for muddy field conditions with more horsepower and duals, keeping work moving through tough ground.

media:content.media:title: More Horsepower and Duals for Mud Season
media:content.media:description: The equipments are ready for muddy field conditions with more horsepower and duals, keeping work moving through tough ground.

item.title: Last-Minute Repairs Before Go Time
item.description: Equipment ready with last-minute repairs before field work begins. A practical look at farm machinery prep and getting set for the season.

media:content.media:title: Last-Minute Repairs Before Go Time
media:content.media:description: Equipment ready with last-minute repairs before field work begins. A practical look at farm machinery prep and getting set for the season.

item.title: Working With the Big Farm Machines
item.description: The big equipment to work in the field, showing the daily job of running machinery and keeping farm work moving.

media:content.media:title: Working With the Big Farm Machines
media:content.media:description: The big equipment to work in the field, showing the daily job of running machinery and keeping farm work moving.

item.title: New Tracks for the Skid Loader
item.description: The skid loader ready with new tracks, keeping equipment dependable for daily farm work and field jobs.

media:content.media:title: New Tracks for the Skid Loader
media:content.media:description: The skid loader ready with new tracks, keeping equipment dependable for daily farm work and field jobs.

item.title: Working The Kinks Out on the Farm
item.description: Working through the kinks in Episode 3, keeping equipment and field work moving with practical problem-solving.

media:content.media:title: Working The Kinks Out on the Farm
media:content.media:description: Working through the kinks in Episode 3, keeping equipment and field work moving with practical problem-solving.

item.title: Larson Farms Wraps Up Winter Build
item.description: Finishing the winter build and getting equipment ready for the next round of farm work.

media:content.media:title: Larson Farms Wraps Up Winter Build
media:content.media:description: Finishing the winter build and getting equipment ready for the next round of farm work.

item.title: Big Red 3-Wheeler Will Live On
item.description: Keeping the Big Red 3-wheeler in service, showing practical farm equipment care and the value of keeping useful machinery working.

media:content.media:title: Big Red 3-Wheeler Will Live On
media:content.media:description: Keeping the Big Red 3-wheeler in service, showing practical farm equipment care and the value of keeping useful machinery working.
